title: Gray's Cosier Critters
description: Retexture Cosy Critters and Creepy Crawlies particle effects!
body:
I thought it'd be cute to revamp CC&CC's textures. No more downscaled PNGs!

What this pack changes:
Revamps all Crow particle textures.
Revamps all Moth particle textures.
Revamps all Spider particle textures.
Removes "Hatman"..?
